title: Grow your career with a monday.com certification - webinar

posts.author: Omer (Omer Fast)
posts.cookedHtml:
Join us live to explore how professional certifications can boost your career and elevate your professional skillset—plus hear from a certified user on how it changed their career journey.

Agenda:

  • monday.com’s certification framework
  • The certification experience: learning, testing, recognition
  • How a monday.com certification can impact your career
  • Q&A on certification prep and next steps
    • You’ll also hear directly from Tara Horn, certified monday.com Silver partner, on how it’s changed her career journey.
